title: Database Schema
summary: Reference spec for the Prisma 7 / PostgreSQL data layer: 15 models, 20 enums, Redis key patterns, query patterns, and Stripe/escrow field contracts.
scope: Enums (AccountType, UserStatus, BudgetType, Urgency, PostStatus, OfferType, PricingType, OfferStatus, TransactionType, EscrowStatus, TransactionStatus, etc.)
Redis key patterns (auth, messaging, AI rate limiting)
Post query and feed filtering patterns
Stripe integration fields and escrow state machine
notes: Strong SPEC content signals (schema tables, enum value lists, unique constraints, Redis key tables, escrow state machine, integration field contracts). No SPEC/RFC filename or frontmatter, hence medium confidence rather than high. Some prose explains rationale across sessions, but the dominant content is implementation contracts the system must honor — classified SPEC over DOC.
